nasb.text: I will draw out to you Sisera, the commander of Jabin’s army, with his chariots and his many troops to the river Kishon, and I will give him into your hand.’ ”

esv.text: And I will draw out Sisera, the general of Jabin’s army, to meet you by the river Kishon with his chariots and his troops, and I will give him into your hand’?”

cnv.text: 我必引耶賓的軍長西西拉，和他的車輛與全軍，到基順河往你那裡去；我必把他們交在你手裡。’”

ccb.text: 祂必使耶宾的将军西西拉率领全军和战车到基顺河与你交战，祂必把西西拉交在你手中。”
